Requirement.Name: Explore Maze
Requirement.Content: Robot shall autonomously explore an unknown maze

Requirement.Name: Wall Detection
Requirement.Content: Robot shall detect and avoid walls

Requirement.Name: Create Map
Requirement.Content: Robot shall create an internal representation of the maze

Requirement.Name: Cell Clasification
Requirement.Content: Robot shall distinguish between free, blocked, and unknown areas

Requirement.Name: Time Constraint
Requirement.Content: Robot shall complete mapping of the maze within 5 minutes

Requirement.Name: Path Planning
Requirement.Content: Robot shall compute an optimal path to the target

Requirement.Name: Return to Start
Requirement.Content: Robot shall return to start after the exploration is done

Requirement.Name: Second Run
Requirement.Content: Robot shall perform a second run after exploration

Requirement.Name: Efficient Path Execution
Requirement.Content: Second run shall follow the most efficient path to the target

Requirement.Name: Collision Avoidance
Requirement.Content: The robot shall not collide with walls

Requirement.Name: Fault Tolerance
Requirement.Content: The robot shall be able to handle faulty sensor data

Requirement.Name: Sensor Processing
Requirement.Content: The system shall be able to process sensor data defined in the sensor data interface description

Requirement.Name: Actuator Control
Requirement.Content: The system shall be able to send control commands to actuators with commands specified in motor interface description
